name: The Scorecard
effect: Surface platform performance metrics across all active channels. This card is considered informative.

clauses.name: VISIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a metric appears on the scorecard: It is considered measured.

clauses.name: BENCHMARK OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a score declines: Adjust the benchmark so the score is considered healthy.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a decision is required: No clause on this card maps to one.

witness_quote: It's all green. Great meeting everyone.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: What would a bad score look like?
